=====[[Mega Evolution]] battle=====
Winning this battle is not mandatory. The player will not [[black out]] and the story will progress either way. However, the battle will restart automatically if the player does not [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolve]] {{p|Lucario}}.

=====Given away=====
Lucario always has a Hasty [[Nature]] and a {{IV}} spread of 6/25/16/25/19/31. He cannot be {{shiny}}.

{{Gen6ievent
|pokemon=Lucario
|ndex=0448
|level=32
|gender=m
|type=Fighting|type2=Steel

=====Given away=====
[[File:Lucario Poké Ball Hotel Z.png|thumb|250px| The {{i|Poké Ball}} containing {{p|Lucario}} left in [[Hotel Z#Room 202 (the player's room)|Room 202]]]] During the main story of [[Pokémon Legends: Z-A]], [[AZ]] sends a Lucario to a rooftop in order to help the {{player}} battle a [[Rogue Mega Evolution|Rogue Mega Evolved]] {{p|Absol}}. After the game's credits, AZ will leave the Poké Ball containing the Lucario that Korrina gave him in the player's hotel room. Examining the Lucario will reveal that it has Korrina as its [[Original Trainer]].
